'''sogadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judenrein|judenrein]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judenrein|judenrein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sogadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogadithi|sogadithi]] || [[word:sogadiji|sogadiji]] || [[word:sogadishi|sogadishi]] || [[word:sogadiki|sogadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogaduthuthu|sogaduthuthu]] || [[word:sogadujuju|sogadujuju]] || [[word:sogadushushu|sogadushushu]] || [[word:sogadukuku|sogadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogaduthu|sogaduthu]] || [[word:sogaduju|sogaduju]] || [[word:sogadushu|sogadushu]] || [[word:sogaduku|sogaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogadufthuf|sogadufthuf]] || [[word:sogadufjuf|sogadufjuf]] || [[word:sogadufshuf|sogadufshuf]] || [[word:sogadufkuf|sogadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogadethe|sogadethe]] || [[word:sogadeje|sogadeje]] || [[word:sogadeshe|sogadeshe]] || [[word:sogadeke|sogadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogadothotho|sogadothotho]] || [[word:sogadojojo|sogadojojo]] || [[word:sogadoshosho|sogadoshosho]] || [[word:sogadokoko|sogadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogadotho|sogadotho]] || [[word:sogadojo|sogadojo]] || [[word:sogadosho|sogadosho]] || [[word:sogadoko|sogadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogadofthof|sogadofthof]] || [[word:sogadofjof|sogadofjof]] || [[word:sogadofshof|sogadofshof]] || [[word:sogadofkof|sogadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfthÃŸf|sogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfjÃŸf|sogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfshÃŸf|sogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfkÃŸf|sogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|sogadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|sogadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|sogadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|sogadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfthÃŸf|sogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfjÃŸf|sogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfshÃŸf|sogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfkÃŸf|sogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfthÃŸf|sogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfjÃŸf|sogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfshÃŸf|sogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogadÃŸfkÃŸf|sogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogadÃḊthÃḊ|sogadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:sogadÃḊjÃḊ|sogadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:sogadÃḊshÃḊ|sogadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:sogadÃḊkÃḊ|sogadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogadathatha|sogadathatha]] || [[word:sogadajaja|sogadajaja]] || [[word:sogadashasha|sogadashasha]] || [[word:sogadakaka|sogadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogadatha|sogadatha]] || [[word:sogadaja|sogadaja]] || [[word:sogadasha|sogadasha]] || [[word:sogadaka|sogadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogadafthaf|sogadafthaf]] || [[word:sogadafjaf|sogadafjaf]] || [[word:sogadafshaf|sogadafshaf]] || [[word:sogadafkaf|sogadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sogadasha|sogadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogadshÃḋsha|sogadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogadrosha|sogadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogadmusha|sogadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogadyasha|sogadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogadnkshÃḋsha|gosogadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogadnkrosha|gosogadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogadnkmusha|gosogadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogadnkyasha|gosogadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sogagadasha|sogagadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogagadshÃḋsha|sogagadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogagadrosha|sogagadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogagadmusha|sogagadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogagadyasha|sogagadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogagadnkshÃḋsha|gosogagadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogagadnkrosha|gosogagadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogagadnkmusha|gosogagadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogagadnkyasha|gosogagadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:segÃḊdasha|segÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:segÃḊdshÃḋsha|segÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:segÃḊdrosha|segÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:segÃḊdmusha|segÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:segÃḊdyasha|segÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosegÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gosegÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosegÃḊdnkrosha|gosegÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosegÃḊdnkmusha|gosegÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosegÃḊdnkyasha|gosegÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sogfadasha|sogfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogfadshÃḋsha|sogfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogfadrosha|sogfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogfadmusha|sogfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogfadyasha|sogfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogfadnkshÃḋsha|gosogfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogfadnkrosha|gosogfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogfadnkmusha|gosogfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogfadnkyasha|gosogfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
